title: Camp configuration
description: Per-camp config for yah workspaces (.yah/camp.toml). Replaces the pre-R179 trio of camp.json, agent-settings.json, and approval.toml.

viewports.description: Subdirectories explicitly declared as viewports of this camp.

tab.description: Default UI tab on camp open.

arch_depth.description: Default depth for arch graph slices.

writers_enabled.description: When true, the runner exposes write tools behind the approval gate. Default: false.

mcp_debug.description: When true, yah MCP server tees every stdio frame to .yah/mcp-debug.jsonl. Default: false.

concierge_subclass.description: Subclass ID to use as the camp's concierge singleton. Falls back to the Thief→Cleric heuristic when absent.

writes.description: Policy for board.* write verbs. "prompt" routes through the approval gate; "auto" auto-passes without prompting.
